description: Vendor rebate invoice for quarterly purchase volume tier with rebate percentage applied
parsed_text:
REBATE CREDIT INVOICE
Invoice #: RBI-2025-Q2-0044
Issue Date: 2025-07-15   Payment Due: 2025-08-14
Issued By: Apex Distribution Partners LLC
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX8810
Vendor Address: 2100 Wholesale Way, Kansas City, MO 64108
Issued To: Cornerstone Home Goods Inc.
Accounts Receivable, 330 Meridian Ave, Indianapolis, IN 46204
Account Number: APEX-CHG-2201
PO/Agreement Reference: MSA-2025-0017
Payment Terms: Net 30   Currency: USD

Quarterly Rebate Calculation — Q2 2025 (April 1 – June 30, 2025):

Total Q2 Net Purchases (per sales ledger):    $847,320.00

Rebate Tier Achieved:
  Tier 1: $0 – $500,000          Rebate Rate: 1.00%
  Tier 2: $500,001 – $750,000    Rebate Rate: 1.75%  ← Tier achieved through $750,000
  Tier 3: $750,001 and above     Rebate Rate: 2.50%  ← Tier achieved on $97,320.00 excess

Rebate Calculation Detail:
1. Tier 1 Rebate — $500,000 x 1.00%            $5,000.00
2. Tier 2 Rebate — $250,000 x 1.75%            $4,375.00
3. Tier 3 Rebate — $97,320.00 x 2.50%          $2,433.00

Total Rebate Amount Due:                       $11,808.00
Tax:                                                $0.00

This rebate invoice represents amounts owed by Apex Distribution Partners LLC to Cornerstone Home Goods Inc. per Section 7 of Master Supply Agreement MSA-2025-0017.
Payment will be made via ACH to account on file.
Questions: rebates@apexdist.com | 816-555-0275
